Вместе с тем, это не нудное поучительное рассуждение. Ленты также повествуют о личном выборе героя в сложных жизненных обстоятельствах, которые будут близки всем зрителям.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: Mystery movie. American mystery, produced in 2017. Retired homicide detective Ray Archer and his partner, ex FBI agent Will Ruiney, are assigned to track down a vicious serial killer, who is playing a twisted version of the childrens game Hangman.

programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: Charlotte is a woman with anger management issues whose therapist suggests she write a journal to keep her emotions in check. Unlucky in love, she ventures online to find a boyfriend. Just as she reaches her limit of unsuccessful dates, Charlotte meets her soul mate Lyle. Everything is perfect until Lyle finds Charlottes journal and sets out to prove just how deeply he loves her.

programme.title: Love Is Not Enough
programme.desc: Samir, must face his parents breakup. While they meet to find the way to tell him, the little Samir surprises them, because he knows perfectly whats happening, putting his own parents into a hard place with his vision of the situation.

programme.title: Slackers
programme.desc: Dave Goodman, Sam Schecter, and Jeff Davis are best friends who have spent almost four years at Holden University scamming their way through college. During one exam scam in their final semester Dave discovers Angela, and asks her out while writing his phone number on her exam sheet. Ethan Dulles (who calls himself "Cool Ethan"), a classmate obsessed with Angela to the extent of collecting loose hairs and making a hair doll and having surveillance photos and a shrine to Angela setup in his dorm room, takes her exam question sheet after Angela leaves and uses it to repeatedly confront and then blackmail the guys into setting up a successful date with Angela for him in exchange for his silence on the matter. The guys set Ethan up in multiple situations in an attempt to convince Angela to like him, while Dave tells Sam during their work researching her that Angela is no more important to him as any other scam theyve done. Ethan fails to attract her after frequent confrontations based on his delusional behavior, immaturity and ignorance of social norms. Though Ethan seems a lonely harmless nerd, he is scheming, psychotically obsessive and hopelessly socially incompetent.

programme.title: Unknown Energies, Unidentified Emotions
programme.desc: A hybrid of animated, experimental, feature and genre film in found footage technique, with a radio phonic sound and of unexpected, almost 40-minute duration. Journalist Isidor Dukas visits the Institute for Research on Psychic Phenomena and Mental Film when a confrontation with one of the test subjects transforms a routine check into a never-ending maze. Barićs work calls into question issues surrounding artistic practices in the digital age including ideas about authenticity, simulation/replication and appropriation.

programme.title: Digging Into China
programme.desc: Harriet, a ten-year old girl, lives together with her big sister and her alcoholic mother out in the countryside. The family runs a motel. Harriet is different from the others, as she owns a great creativity and has nobody to play with. Her infinite world exists only in her mind. One day, Ricky comes along. He is a grown-up, but retarded son of an elderly lady. Soon, Harriet and Ricky share their experiences of life from a different point of view and become close friends. But his mother still plans to give Ricky away into professional care in a home, because she wont live forever to be there for him.

programme.title: Mayor Cupcake
programme.desc: A hard-working cupcake maker is inadvertently elected mayor of a small town burdened with debt. With no formal experience or education to speak of, she must rely on her street smarts to clean up the town.

programme.title: Timber the Treasure Dog
programme.desc: A boy rises to the occasion with his best friend (a lovable talking dog) to save his home and family.

programme.title: Baba
programme.desc: An weird but witty old woman is forced to deal with an ambiguous future after her country, family and the entire system of values are ruined. She is trying to solve her existential problems catching d trying to sell a rewarded war criminal as he was a rabbit in a wood. The only thing she did not know if he is really him.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In December 1941, Japan expands the occupation of its neighbouring countries to Southeast Asia. The railway from Tianjin to Nanjing in East China became a key military transportation route, heavily guarded by Japanese soldiers. Railroad worker Ma Yuan (Jackie Chan) leads a team of freedom fighters. Using his deep knowledge of the train network, he and his men sabotage it, ambushing Japanese soldiers and stealing supplies to feed the starving Chinese. Although the freedom fighters have no weapons of their own, they employ whatever tools are at hand, including a hammer and shovels, loose railway track planks and diverted trains. The local Chinese call the unlikely heroes the "Railroad Tigers". The freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when the Japanese send reinforcements to Shandong. In an act of defiance, Ma Yuan launches his most dangerous mission yet, blowing up a heavily guarded railroad bridge. When the Japanese learn of the crippling plan, which will derail the war effort, the stakes are raised even higher. After many missed opportunities and missed shots, the bridge is blown up by the ragtag Chinese railroad tigers.

programme.title: Foolproof
programme.desc: Kevin, Samantha and Rob live for Foolproof; their own private club where through high-tech, meticulously thought out and executed plans, they pull off the most impossible of heists - all in theory that is. Theyve never actually done it for real. But all that changes when Leo, a cutthroat British gangster, rips off their foolproof plans for a diamond heist and uses it to successfully execute the robbery. Threatening to implicate them, Leo blackmails them to pull off a robbery worth $20 million in corporate bonds.

programme.title: Lost in Florence
programme.desc: When Eleroo advises Bumblelion to make a wish when getting the biggest part of the wishbone, it means trouble for poor Rhinokey for losing two bank bags of money. Bumblelion starts spending the money and looses his friends while Rhinokey manages to escape from Officer Eaglebeagle. Rhinokey tries to convince Bumblelion to return the bank bags, but Bumblelion decides to run off thinking that Rhinokey wants to steal his money. Soon after, Bumblelion realizes how Rhinokey lost the bank bags and returns the money to the police.

programme.title: Cookies Fortune
programme.desc: Cookies Fortune unfolds over an eventful Easter weekend in the small town of Holly Springs, Mississippi. The town residents are peaceful, kind folk--with the exception of Camille Dixon (Glenn Close) - a pushy theatre director with an incredibly shy younger sister, Cora (Julianne Moore), whose estranged daughter Emma (Liv Tyler) has just returned to town. On the heels of her latest play, Camille is shocked to discover that her Aunt Jewel Mae "Cookie" Orcutt (Patricia Neal) has committed suicide. Terrified at the thought of how this will tarnish the family name, she eats the suicide note to make it look like a burglary. This set-up leads the police to one main suspect, Willis Richland (Charles S. Dutton), who also happens to be Cookies best friend. Although the rest of the town is convinced Willis didnt commit the crime, an outside investigator (Courtney B. Vance) isnt so sure. As Easter Sunday and opening night of the play arrive, the truth comes out, revealing more secrets than anyone could have possibly imagined.

programme.title: Black Cop
programme.desc: A black police officer gets pushed to the edge after he is profiled and assaulted by the colleagues he worked side by side with, so he decides to get revenge and take his frustrations out on the community that he swore to protect.

programme.title: The Zodiac
programme.desc: THE ZODIAC takes a different look at the famous Zodiac Killer case from other screen treatments of the murders. More than a simple crime story, the film is an emotional thriller focusing on the murders impact on victims, their families and the wider community. The film follows a police detective and his son who become obsessed with the murders and endanger their family in the process.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: Science fiction movie. Canadian sci-fi, produced in 2017. A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: Land Of the Blind
programme.desc: A soldier recounts his relationship with a famous political prisoner attempting to overthrow their countrys authoritarian government.

programme.title: The Flock
programme.desc: This film is about a hyper-vigilant employee of the department of public safety who, while training his young female replacement, has to track down a missing girl who he is convinced is connected to a paroled sex offender he is investigating.

programme.title: Jungle Boy
programme.desc: In a humble village on the edge of the jungle, a young boy strays from his mother to play with a monkey. Lost in the jungle, he is saved by the great elephant, who will raise him as a member of the great family of animals. When he grows up he helps to protect the jungle from a ruthless poacher.

programme.title: Raspberry Magic
programme.desc: "Raspberry Magic" is a coming-of-age story about 11-year-old Monica Shah, who thinks she must win the science fair in order to bring her father back after he runs out on the family. She blames herself for her parents problems, and takes charge when her mother falls into a deep depression. Set behind the backdrop of a beautiful forest, Monicas experiment uses touch therapy to help raspberries grow faster. She asks, is it nature or nurture that can truly help a being grow? Does it even matter? Through her ups and downs with her family, she learns that its a complex question, and the answer isnt so simple.

programme.title: Train Master
programme.desc: 62 year old Jeremiah Wilson is truly the Train Master of Willamette Western Railroad. He lives, breaths, and eats railroad. When Brett Banner, 32 year old heir to New York Eastern talks his dad into purchasing Willamette Western, there is immediately a clash between himself and Jeremiah. Jeremiah is fired by Brett two years from retirement and turns into a angry, depressed grandfather. When Bretts nine year old son Justin realizes Jeremiahs grandson Thomas can drive a locomotive, he kidnaps and holds Thomas favorite dinosaur ransom. Justin, Thomas and 3 other children board an old engine in for repairs and accidentally turns it into runaway engine causing a chain reaction of events.

programme.title: The Adventure Scouts
programme.desc: A coming of age movie about a group of boys and girls called "adventure scouts" who return from a camping trip to discover their small town is being held captive by a gang of motorcycle-riding knuckleheads. Using only their scouting knowledge and camping equipment, the kids take down the gang members one by one, reunite with family members, and restore the communitys sense of pride.

programme.title: House of the Stone Monkeys
programme.desc: The action proceeds along two tracks and two time frames. We meet the boy, who lives with his mother in a Budapest apartment house, in the summer of 2012. Another boy is spending his vacation with his grandparents in the same building in the summer of 1982. The house unveils its mysterious secret to both of them.

programme.title: Irish Jam
programme.desc: A South Central L.A. con artist with rap skills tries to keep bill collectors and his lover, with marriage in mind, at bay by entering a poetry contest staged by a small Irish town. Can his rhyming skills help the town and win him the prize money?

programme.title: North and South: The Battle of New Market
programme.desc: Based on a true story of the American Civil War, culminating at the Battle of New Market, May 1864. A group of teenage cadets sheltered from war at the Virginia Military Institute must confront the horrors of an adult world when they are called upon to defend the Shenandoah Valley. Leaving behind their youth, these cadets must decide what they are fighting for.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: Donald P. Sinclair has placed six separate gold coins in different slot machines in his casino. The lucky six who find these coins discover an opportunity of a lifetime. The chance to own $2 million. Locked up in a locker in New Mexico, these six contestants must now race each other, to be the first to the cash. There are no rules in place and everything that could possibly happen, does. Whilst, behind the scenes, Sinclairs associates are placing their bets.

programme.title: Spooner
programme.desc: Facing eviction from his parents home on his 30th birthday, a socially awkward guy meets the girl of his dreams and creates his own rules for growing up.

programme.title: Remembrance
programme.desc: Remembrance depicts a remarkable love story that blossomed amidst the terror of a German concentration camp in 1944 Poland. This impossible passion fuels the courage of a Polish prisoner who manages to rescue his Jewish girlfriend. Against all odds, they escape the camp and survive a treacherous journey to freedom. But during the chaos of the end of the war, they are forcibly separated and each is convinced that the other has died. More than thirty years later in New York, the happily married 52-year-old woman accidentally finds out that her former Polish lover is still alive. And she has to see him again.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Every ten years in an unsuspecting town, The Tournament takes place. A battle royale between 40 of the worlds deadliest assassins. The last man standing receiving the $10,000,000 cash prize and the title of Worlds No1, which itself carries the legendary million dollar a bullet price tag. All fights are monitored 24hrs a day on redirected CCTV cameras and broadcast secretly to a ring of high stake billionaire gamblers. A gritty, multistranded action-thriller, The Tournament brings together international killers from every imaginable discipline in a blood-bathed contest to the death. We follow the competition favourites through stories of love, betrayal, revenge and redemption as they finally discover the true value of life

programme.title: Existenz
programme.desc: A game designer on the run from assassins must play her latest virtual reality creation with a marketing trainee to determine if the game has been damaged.

programme.title: The Cooler
programme.desc: Bernie Lootz (William H. Macy) is a long-time "cooler" at the Shangri-La casino in Las Vegas: he is paid to bring his black cloud to any table where a gambler is on a roll. But when Bernies luck starts changing for the better--thanks in part to a pretty cocktail waitress--he suddenly loses his cooling talents, incurring the ire of the casino owner in the process.

programme.title: The Defender
programme.desc: Today - the global war on terror rages on. The United States will not give an inch against terrorists, especially Mohamed Jamar, considered to be the worst of them all. Jamar has been missing for months, but his network continues its function. The President stands firm before the world, but behind the scenes his teams are working to find the final solution. Jamar represents a paradox: he can never be killed, because if found dead he would become an instant martyr. If caught he must be tried. If he is found guilty he would become a martyr and further inspiration to acts of terror. If acquitted, the policies of the entire western world would be destroyed. So he must remain invisible. Roberta Jones, the head of the National Security Agency, is working to ensure he remains invisible, forever. Under the guise of attending an Eastern European conference on Terror in Romania, she attends a secret meeting with Jamar at a secluded hotel outside Bucharest. No one knows about this meeting and her goal is to buy his invisibility. Her only companions are her security team of six headed by her personal bodyguard, Lance Rockford. They are the best of the best, former military special forces personnel capable of anything. When they arrive at the hotel for the secret meeting they are ambushed no one is supposed to know about the meeting, but someone wants it stopped. They have to fight for their lives against an unknown attacker. Lance, a man of highest integrity with an impressive record of service for his country, is forced into a situation which challenges his very beliefs...

programme.title: Par manu tēvu
programme.desc: Kad Sebastjans atklāj savam vecmodīgajam tēvam Salvo, ka vēlas bildināt savu amerikāņu draudzeni, tēvs uzstāj, ka vēlas pavadīt nedēļas nogali kopā ar savu topošo vedeklu. Brīvdienas izvēršas patiesā kultūru sadursmē, ļaujot Sebastjanam un Salvo atklāt to, ka ģimenē pats svarīgākais ir pati ģimene.

programme.title: Džokers
programme.desc: Niks Vailds ir apsargs Lasvegasā, kura vājība ir azartspēles. Cenšoties palīdzēt savai draudzenei, viņš pamatīgi sadusmo bagātu mafijas bosu un iekuļas lielās nepatikšanās. Tagad viņam priekšā liktenīgā spēle, uz kuras liktas lielas likmes. Visu vai neko - citas izvēles nav. Galvenajās lomās: Džeisons Stethems, Dominika Garsija-Lorido, Sofija Vergara.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Saulains velobrauciens cauri Lahemā.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Par manu tēvu
programme.desc: Kad Sebastjans atklāj savam vecmodīgajam tēvam Salvo, ka vēlas bildināt savu amerikāņu draudzeni, tēvs uzstāj, ka vēlas pavadīt nedēļas nogali kopā ar savu topošo vedeklu. Brīvdienas izvēršas patiesā kultūru sadursmē, ļaujot Sebastjanam un Salvo atklāt to, ka ģimenē pats svarīgākais ir pati ģimene.

programme.title: Cīņa
programme.desc: FIB aģents meklē iespēju atriebties noslēpumainam slepkavam "Rogue", kas nogalinājis viņa partneri.

programme.desc: FIB aģents meklē iespēju atriebties noslēpumainam slepkavam "Rogue", kas nogalinājis viņa partneri.

programme.title: Radio pirāti
programme.desc: Pēc patiesiem notikumiem veidota filma par rokenrola dīdžejiem, kuru "pirātu radio" 1960. gados aizrāvis un iedvesmojis britus. Atskaņojot savas desmitgades labāko un dumpīgāko mūziku, saujiņa dīdžeju pārdroši un ļoti komiski turas pretī valdības lēmumam slēgt radio staciju.

programme.title: Sasalusī zeme
programme.desc: Maniaks Roberts Hansens savus noziegumus pastrādāja XX gs. 80. gados un tiek turēts aizdomās par 20 sieviešu noslepkavošanu. Viņš aizveda savus upurus Aļaskas savvaļā, vēroja tos un pēc tam medīja kā dzīvniekus. Maniaks dzīvoja kā gluži parasts cilvēks - bija kārtīgs ģimenes tēvs, ceptuves īpašnieks un krietns mednieks. Policijas centieni aizturēt slepkavu cieta sakāvi, un tā turpinājās veselus 13 gadus. Tikai policijas seržants Džeks Halkombs nenolaiž rokas un pamazām tuvojas mērķim - slepkavību noslēpuma atminējumam.

programme.title: Avārijas nosēšanās
programme.desc: Veicot riskantu nolaišanos kara plosītā salā, pilots Broudijs Torenss izglābj pasažierus no zibens spēriena, bet izdzīvošana, veiksmīgi piezemējoties, ir tikai sākums. Kad lielāko daļu pasažieru gūstā saņem bīstami separātisti, vienīgais, uz kura palīdzību Torenss var paļauties, ir slepkavībā apsūdzētais Luiss Gaspārs, kuru aizturējis FIB. Lai glābtu pasažierus, Torensam vajadzīga Gaspāra palīdzība, un viņš par sabiedroto uzzinās vairāk, nekā redzams no malas.

programme.title: Radio pirāti
programme.desc: Pēc patiesiem notikumiem veidota filma par rokenrola dīdžejiem, kuru "pirātu radio" 1960. gados aizrāvis un iedvesmojis britus. Atskaņojot savas desmitgades labāko un dumpīgāko mūziku, saujiņa dīdžeju pārdroši un ļoti komiski turas pretī valdības lēmumam slēgt radio staciju.

programme.desc: Maniaks Roberts Hansens savus noziegumus pastrādāja XX gs. 80. gados un tiek turēts aizdomās par 20 sieviešu noslepkavošanu. Viņš aizveda savus upurus Aļaskas savvaļā, vēroja tos un pēc tam medīja kā dzīvniekus. Maniaks dzīvoja kā gluži parasts cilvēks - bija kārtīgs ģimenes tēvs, ceptuves īpašnieks un krietns mednieks. Policijas centieni aizturēt slepkavu cieta sakāvi, un tā turpinājās veselus 13 gadus. Tikai policijas seržants Džeks Halkombs nenolaiž rokas un pamazām tuvojas mērķim - slepkavību noslēpuma atminējumam.

programme.title: P.S. Es mīlu tevi
programme.desc: Holija Kenedija ir skaista, gudra un precējusies ar savu mūža mīlestību - kaislīgu, jautru un impulsīvu īru puisi Geriju. Taču kad slimība atņem Gerija dzīvību, Holijas dzīvei arī vairs nav jēgas. Vienīgais, kurš spētu palīdzēt, ir cilvēks, kura vairs nav. Neviens nepazīst Holiju labāk kā Gerijs. To viņš apzinājās vēl dzīvs būdams, un tāpēc uzrakstīja Holijai vēstules, kas palīdzēs bēdās un ļaus sākt dzīvi no jauna.

programme.title: Malorija Keina. Nevaldāmā.
programme.desc: Viņa strādā ātri, efektīvi, un vissvarīgāk - tīri. Kad kādas operācijas laikā viņa no drošas nāves izglābj ķīniešu žurnālistu, Melorija uzzina, pie kādiem cilvēkiem patiesībā strādājusi, un kļūst par ienaidnieci tai pašai valdībai, kuras uzdevumus līdz šim pildījusi. Tikko paglābusies no nāves, Melorija saprot, ka vienīgais veids, kā glābt sevi, ir nodot valdības sazvērestību atklātībā.

programme.title: Avota kods
programme.desc: ASV armijas pilots Kolters atmostas Čikāgas piepilsētas vilcienā. Kolters nezina, kas viņš ir, kā viņu sauc un kā ķermenī atrodas. Taču izskatās, ka visi pārējie pasažieri viņu pazīst. Pirms Kolters saprot, kur atrodas, jaudīgs sprādziens iznīcina gan vilcienu, gan visus pasažierus... Taču pēc sekundes Kolters atkal atmostas tajā pašā vilcienā, pārdzīvojot tos pašus notikumus no jauna. Kā izrādās, Kolters ir datorprogramas sastāvdaļa. Viņa uzdevums - 17 minūšu laikā atrast un atbruņot teroristu, tādējādi novēršot katastrofu. Galvenajās lomās: Džeiks Gilenhāls, Mišela Monagana, Džefrijs Raits, Rasels Pīters

programme.title: P.S. Es mīlu tevi
programme.desc: Holija Kenedija ir skaista, gudra un precējusies ar savu mūža mīlestību - kaislīgu, jautru un impulsīvu īru puisi Geriju. Taču kad slimība atņem Gerija dzīvību, Holijas dzīvei arī vairs nav jēgas. Vienīgais, kurš spētu palīdzēt, ir cilvēks, kura vairs nav. Neviens nepazīst Holiju labāk kā Gerijs. programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Litogrāfijas mākslas radīšana.

programme.title: Dzīvot šodienai
programme.desc: Brīdī, kad liktenis viņus saved kopā, Almutas lielais sapnis ir kļūt par veiksmīgāko šefpavāri, bet romantiskais Tobiass joprojām nevar atgūties no sāpīgas šķiršanās.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?

programme.title: Suņu sala
programme.desc: Kad pēc korumpētā mēra pavēles visi Megasaki pilsētas suņi tiek nosūtīti dzīvot uz vientuļas salas, 12 gadus veco Atari vienatnē dodas glābt savu uzticamo suni Spotu. Kopā ar pārējiem suņiem viņš uzsāk krusta gājienu pret korumpēto mēru.

programme.title: VĪRIETIS, KURU MĪLĒJA PAR DAUDZ
programme.desc: Francijas Rivjēra, 1970. gadi. Atstājusi pagātnē savas neveiksmīgās laulības, Agnese Le Rū atgriežas Nicā pie mātes - kazino "Vidusjūras pils" saimnieces. Šajā laikā Azūra piekrastē izceļas neafišēts "kazino karš", notiek īpašumu pārdale starp krimināliem grupējumiem, kas saasina jau tā sarežģītās attiecības ģimenē.

programme.title: Valdības noslēpumi
programme.desc: Keira Naitlija un Ralfs Fainss trillerī uz patiesiem notikumiem. Ir 2003. gads. ASV un britu politiķi debatē par Irākas masu iznīcināšanas ieročiem, to specdienesti tikmēr aktīvi strādā, lai izplatītu nepatiesu informāciju, kas pamatotu iebrukumu šajā valstī. Britu aģente nostājas pret savu valsti, lai atklātu patiesību sabiedrībai par ASV slepenās organizācijas NSA nelegālām darbībām, lai sankcionētu iebrukumu Irākā.

programme.title: Neatklātie ieraksti
programme.desc: Rozannai jeb Rozai pēc 50 gadiem ir jāpamet psihiatriskā klīnika, ko sieviete sauc par mājām visus šos gadus. Roza atsakās vietu pamest. Kad pie viņas ierodas ārsts Viljams Grīns, viņš uzzina, ka Roza piekopj savādus ikdienas rituālus un ilgus gadus rakstījusi dienasgrāmatu ar kodētiem ierakstiem. Jaunā Roza Otrā pasaules kara laikā ir zaudējusi savu māti un negaidīti iemīlas lidotājā. Tomēr Rozu pašu nolūkojis vietējais priesteris. Savstarpējās attiecības kļūst sarežģītas. Pēc daudziem gadiem slēptā patiesība pamazām atklājas Rozas dienasgrāmatu ierakstos. Galvenās lomas atveidotāja ir Rūnija Mara, amerikāņu aktrise, divu "Oskara" balvu nominante, arī viņas māsa Keita Mara ir aktrise un popularitāti guva ar Zojas lomu politiskajā detektīvseriālā "Kāršu namiņš" kopā ar Kevinu Speisiju un Robinu Raitu. Rūnija Mara atveidojusi lomas tādās filmās kā "Meitene ar pūķa tetovējumu", "Blakusefekts", "Kerola". Īru režisors Džims Šeridans ir veidojis tādas filmas kā "Mana kreisā kāja", "Brāļi", "Bokseris". Karjeras laikā nominēts sešiem "Oskariem" kā labākais režisors un scenārija autors. Lomās: Rūnija Mara, Vanesa Redgreiva, Teo Džeimss, Eidans Tērners, un citi. Rež: Džims Šeridans

programme.title: Tu būsi mans dēls
programme.desc: Polam nav ticības, ka viņa dēls Martins mantos prestižo ģimenes vīna darītavu. Pols sapņo par strādīgu, veiksmīgu dēlu - sapni, kas kādu dienu, šķiet, piepildās, kad viņš satiek Filipu, sava mirstošā muižas pārvaldnieka dēlu.

programme.title: Ofēlija
programme.desc: Filmā "Ofēlija", kas veidota pēc Lisas Klainas romāna, Ofēlija, slavenā Šekspīra lugas "Hamlets" varone, vēsta savu versiju par to, kā patiesībā risinājās lugā aprakstītie notikumi. Ofēliju, dumpīgo, bez mātes augušo meiteni, pieņem audzināšanā karaliene Ģertrūde. Viņā iemīlas Ģertrūdes dēls princis Hamlets, un viņi slepus apprecas laikā, kad Dānijas karaļvalsti apdraud norvēģu iebrukums un galma iekšienē vērptās intrigas. Ofēlijai un Hamletam ir jāizvēlas starp mīlestību un atriebības alkām.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Novelist Ann Patchett joins Ina for a fun-filled day at the barn, complete with a country dessert and a delicious grain salad done two ways.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Brave and talented chefs attempt to take down Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli, the most feared and accomplished competition cook in America. Chef Alex goes up against three chefs in two rounds of cooking, and anyone -- even Alex -- can be sent home after a blind tasting by the judges. Each chef hails from a different state, but they all share the same culinary specialty and drive to beat Alex for ultimate bragging rights and $15,000.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Actress Emily Mortimer joins Ina for a day of conversation, comforting ravioli and a Sunday recipe swap: Yorkshire pudding and American brunch boards.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten

programme.title: Bakers Dozen
programme.desc: Im Not Basic. The bakers begin by decorating oversized sugar cookies. Later, the three finalists must make extravagant surprise cakes for guest judge Robert Lucas.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Eight bakers create crack-able desserts that represent themselves in one sweet bite. Then, the judges go on an egg hunt with their immersive Easter egg hunt cakes.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson has the bakers use nail art patterns as inspiration for geometric tarts. Then, they model their edible Easter hats on the bunny-walk!

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson asks the bakers to travel to Easter future, where savoury dishes have become sweet. Then, the bakers pair up to make time machines.

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: The sibling teams create cream puff friendship bracelets arranged in two circles, like a pair of bracelets, decorated with messages to each other.

programme.title: Bakers Dozen
programme.desc: Colors, Shapes And Textures. The bakers decorate eye-popping cakes with colour, texture, and dimension. Guest judge Lauren Ko tasks the finalists to make geometric pies or tarts.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Eight bakers create crack-able desserts that represent themselves in one sweet bite. Then, the judges go on an egg hunt with their immersive Easter egg hunt cakes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Crack It!. Eight bakers create crack-able desserts that represent themselves in one sweet bite. Then, the judges go on an egg hunt with their immersive Easter egg hunt cakes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is cooking up her most delicious and memorable suppers from her early days on the farm. Shes making two hearty upper-Midwest classics for a weeknight dinner with her husband Nick and his parents including Chicken Pot Hot Dish and a Sweet Cookie "Salad" with Homemade Cookies and Mandarins. She then honors her "Pizza Friday" tradition by making tasty Sausage and Broccolini Pizza Pockets to be enjoyed out on the tractor with Nick.

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: The sibling teams create cream puff friendship bracelets arranged in two circles, like a pair of bracelets, decorated with messages to each other.

programme.title: Bakers Dozen
programme.desc: Colors, Shapes And Textures. The bakers decorate eye-popping cakes with colour, texture, and dimension. Guest judge Lauren Ko tasks the finalists to make geometric pies or tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Host Eric Adjepong has some tricks up his sleeve when he invites three all-star Chopped judges and some of Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschellis closest friends to the arena. James Beard Award winners Marcus Samuelsson and Scott Conant, along with Tournament of Champions winner Maneet Chauhan, enter the kitchen with a plan to take Alex down, using some of the most difficult ingredients yet. Antonia Lofaso and Jonathon Sawyer judge this historic battle and decide which of the exceptional chefs will go out in the first round. Will Alex be able to defend her name in lights, or will her trusted colleagues become her greatest enemies?

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: The bakers are challenged to tackle some of the biggest wedding trends. They make over-the-top Easter wedding cakes that taste as good as they look.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: The bakers create a gigantic Easter sundae! Then, to earn a spot in the finale, the bakers must prepare a whimsical Easter tea party to remember.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: The final three bakers create a showstopping party display of chocolate, cake, and a cocktail-inspired dessert in hopes of taking home $25,000.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood City Bakes is hosted by the British most loved baker, Paul Hollywood, who explores 10 cities around the globe. He is looking for the family bakeries, corner delis and luxury hotels which have created the baking heritage of entire cities. From Cape Town to Reykjavik, Paul will personally guide into the tastiest baking to be found there, each cities own culture and unique history. Exploring the sights of each city Paul gets inspired and creates two unique recipes of his own.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson has the bakers use nail art patterns as inspiration for geometric tarts. Then, they model their edible Easter hats on the bunny-walk!

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match

programme.title: Ukraine, children of hope
programme.desc: Ukraine: Children of Hope is a powerful documentary portraying the lives of children growing up in the shadow of war. Through intimate interviews and real-life footage from hospitals, schools and orphanages, the film reveals how young Ukrainians cope with loss, displacement and uncertainty. Despite the harsh realities they face, their determination, courage and ability to dream offer a deeply human portrait of resilience and hope for the future.

programme.title: Authors of War
programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. Each episode revisits major conflicts through the eyes of war correspondents, historians and authors whose words captured the realities of battle, the emotions of those involved and the lasting impact of war on societies and collective memory

programme.title: Decolonizations
programme.desc: The 3-part documentary series deals with the little-known circumstances of the destruction of colonies and the process of decolonization of the so-called Third World.

programme.title: Science Warriors
programme.desc: "Warriors of Science" is a documentary about Ukrainian scientists who, along with their research, fight for the countrys freedom with weapons in their hands. The film combines footage of a polar expedition to the Akademik Vernadsky station with the realities of the front, emphasizing the contrast between the scientific silence of Antarctica and the war at home. Through personal stories, it shows how researchers go from scientists to defenders of Ukraine.

programme.title: Cadets. Hostomel Border
programme.desc: " CADETS. GOSTOMEL BORDER " highlights the heroic participation of first-year cadets of the Zhytomyr Military Institute named after Serhiy Korolev in the defense of Kyiv in 2022. The film recreates in detail the events from February 25, when the young unit stood up to defend the strategic Gostomelskyi bridge, and until the beginning of April, while the fighters successfully held positions in the Gorenka area until the occupiers retreated. Through the prism of the memories of the cadets themselves and the high command, in particular Generals Oleksandr Syrskyi and Anatoly Bargylevych , the authors debunk the historical myth of Kruty as a "tragic self-sacrifice", instead drawing a parallel with modernity and proving that both in 1918 and in 2022, the professional actions of young people became successful operations that won the state a critically important time.

programme.title: Izbrauciens
programme.desc: Bens Bārbers (Kevins Hārts) gatavojas precēties ar saderināto Andželu (Tika Samptere), kura ir viņa policijas partnera Džeimsa (Aiss Kjūbs) māsa. Policistus nosūta uzdevumā uz Maiami, lai izmeklētu nežēlīgā narkotiku tirgoņa Antonio Poupa (Bendžamins Brats) nodarījumus, par kuru ir zināms, ka tas apgādā visu Maiami ar narkotikām. Viņi apvienojas ar bezkompromisu detektīvi Maju (Olīvija Manna) un dodas pārtraukt Poupa darbību. Spriedze palielinās, tuvojoties Bena un Andželas kāzām.

programme.title: Ielu advokāts
programme.desc: Mikijs ir advokāts, kas kuļas pa dzīvi, aizstāvot sīkus noziedzniekus un izmantojot savu mašīnu kā biroju. Negaidīti Mikija dzīve mainās - viņam piedāvā aizstāvēt bagātu vīrieti, kuru apsūdz izvarošanā un slepkavības mēģinājumā. Pārliecināts par to, ka spēs labi nopelnīt, Mikijs ar prieku piekrīt vīrieti aizstāvēt, taču jau drīz vien atklāj, ka ir iesaistījies bīstamā sazvērestībā. Viņš ir spiests konstatēt, ka nauda nespēj apklusināt sirdsapziņu. Kārotās atlīdzības vietā Mikijam jācīnās par izdzīvošanu.

programme.title: Triecienmašīna
programme.desc: Jaukto cīņas mākslu un UFC čempiona Marka Kerra stāsts.

programme.title: Spermagedons
programme.desc: Divas sižeta līnijas. Vienā no tām attīstās neveikls, bet sirsnīgs jaunības mīlas stāsts starp Džonu un Lizu, bet otrā skatītājs seko aizraujošam Saimona Spermas un viņa draugu piedzīvojumam ceļā uz kāroto mērķi — Olu. Filma ar humoru un fantāziju pēta pieaugšanu, attiecības un dzīves lielos jautājumus no pavisam negaidīta skatpunkta.

programme.title: X+Y
programme.desc: Zēns, matemātikas ģēnijs ar saskarsmes grūtībām dzīvē un vienaudžu vidū, rod pašpārliecību un jaunus draugus starp britu skolēnu komandas biedriem Starptautiskajā matemātikas olimpiādē.

programme.title: Vīrs, kurš izgudroja Ziemassvētkus
programme.desc: Stāsts par to, kā Čārlzs Dikenss uzrakstīja "Ziemassvētku stāstu", kas kļuva par īstu Ziemassvētku gara atainojumu.

programme.title: After. Pēc mūsu tikšanās
programme.desc: Tesa pavada pirmo dienu prestižā universitātē. Jaunas sejas, vide, grāmatas, kopmītne, universitātes gaiteņi nupat lielisku mācību gada sākumu, patstāvību un ambiciozu mērķi.Taču dzīve ir pilna dažkārt neparedzamu pavērsienu. Pirmā tikšanās ar istabas biedreni Stefu ierauj Tesu studentu dzīves virpulī ar garām naktīm un Hārdinu. Kopā būšana izvēršas par traku piedzīvojumu, taču šķietami skaistajā stāstā apslēpts drūms noslēpums. Kad tas nāks gaismā, Tesas dzīve vairs nebūs tāda kā agrāk.

programme.title: Bitīte Maija: Medus spēles
programme.desc: Strops satraukti dūc – nupat novākta vasaras medus raža. Varbūt beidzot spiets tiks izraudzīts dalībai Medus spēlēs? Maijas jaukais satraukums zūd, kad viņa uzzina, ka strops nepiedalīsies spēlēs, turklāt puse ražas būs jāatdod spēļu dalībniekiem. Maijai tas šķiet netaisnīgi. Bez stropa karalienes atļaujas viņa grasās lidot uz Zumtropoli pie imperatores un lūgt atļauju piedalīties spēlēs, pārstāvot savu stropu. Cenzdamās pierādīt stropa karalienei, ko bites spēj, Maija apsola gūt uzvaru Medus spēlēs un glābt stropa medu. Karaliene piekrīt, bet atgādina, ka, vedot komandu cīņā, Maijai vispirms jāiemācās uzklausīt citus. Maija piedalās spēlēs kopā ar labāko draugu Villiju un seno biedru vaboļu komandu. Drīz viņa sastop skaudīgo bitīti Vijolīti no Zumtropoles, kura ar viltu cenšas atņemt Maijas komandai uzvaru. Bitītei nākas piedzīvot viltus rūgtumu, taču negodīgā Vijolīte un viņas komanda arī iekuļas ķibelē.

programme.title: Lielās sacīkstes cauri Eiropai
programme.desc: Eda, jauna pele ar lieliem sapņiem, izmanto iespēju piedalīties sacīkstēs "Grand Prix", pārģērbusies par savu varoni Edu. Viņa stājas pretī sāncenses sabotāžai un pierāda, ka pat vismazākais braucējs var atstāt vislielāko iespaidu.

programme.title: Džūdija
programme.desc: Biogrāfiska drāma par izcilās ASV dziedātājas un aktrises Džūdijas Gārlendas dzīvi. Gārlenda 1968. gadā, gadu pirms savas nāves, devās uz Eiropu, lai koncertētu Londonā. Filmā attēloti pēdējie mēneši kinozvaigznes dzīvē, pirms viņa izdarīja pašnāvību.

programme.title: Madagaskara
programme.desc: Lauva Alekss ir Ņujorkas Centrālparka zoodārza karalis. Arī viņa labākie draugi zebra Mārtijs, žirafe Melmens un nīlzirgu meitene Glorija visu dzīvi šajā idilliskajā nebrīvē saņēmuši zoodārza apmeklētāju apbrīnu. Taču Mārtijs klusībā kaļ plānus par bēgšanu, un ar dažu apbrīnojami uzņēmīgu pingvīnu palīdzību viņam izdodas izrauties pasaulē, ko viņš sen sapņojis iepazīt. Alekss, Melmens un Glorija viņam seko, taču tiek notverti un nosūtīti uz Āfriku. Kad pingvīni sabotē kuģa komandu, Alekss, Mārtijs, Melmens un Glorija attopas izskaloti eksotiskās Madagaskaras krastā. Nu četriem ņujorkiešiem nākas izdzīvot savvaļā, un tas ir sasodīti grūti.

programme.title: Karš par Pērtiķu planētu
programme.desc: Pērtiķu līderis Cēzars saskaras ar personīgu pārbaudījumu, jo viņam uzbrukušie cilvēku karavīri, kurus vada cietsirdīgais Pulkvedis, nogalina viņa tuviniekus. Cēzars ar savu inteliģento pērtiķu armiju stājas pretim cilvēkiem, kuri iznīcina viņu ģimenes. Ar primitīviem ieročiem bruņotās abu sugu armijas tiksies cīņā, kuras laikā tiks izlemts, kura suga kontrolēs Zemi nākotnē.

programme.title: 28 nedēļas vēlāk
programme.desc: Ir pagājuši seši mēneši, kopš drausma vīrusa epidēmija iznīcinājusi Lielbritānijas iedzīvotājus. ASV armija paziņo, ka karš pret infekciju ir beidzies un ka var sākt valsts atjaunošanas darbus. Atgriežoties pirmajam bēgļu vilnim, kāda ģimene atkal var būt kopā, taču viens no tās locekļiem sevī nes šausmīgu noslēpumu. Vīruss vēl nav miris. Nu tam vairs nav ārēju izpausmju, tāpēc tas ir vēl jo bīstamāks.

programme.title: Karstais pārītis: apbruņotas un apburošas
programme.desc: Viņas ir pilnīgi pretstati - FIB aģente Sāra un Bostonas policiste Šenona. Lai atmaskotu un noķertu starptautiskas nozīmes noziedznieku, tieši viņām ir jākļūst par pāriniecēm. Pēc sākotnējām nesaskaņām un neskaitāmiem komiskiem starpgadījumiem Sārai un Šenonai izdodas kļūt par vienotu komandu - apbruņotas ar neparedzamo sieviešu loģiku un spējīgas apburt jebkuru, karstais pārītis kļūst par nāvējošu ieroci noziedzīgajai pasaulei. Galvenajā lomās Melisa Makārtija un Sandra Buloka.

programme.title: Iesācēja
programme.desc: Studente Aleksa vēlas būt pirmā it visā. Viņa piesakās universitātes airēšanas komandā, un pavisam drīz viņai rodas iespēja pārbaudīt savas fiziskās un psiholoģiskās spējas.

programme.title: Pārdozēšana
programme.desc: Filmas notikumi seko Sārai, Tulūzas narkotiku apkarošanas grupas vadītājai, un Ričardam, vietējās kriminālpolicijas bosam. Sāra spiesta sadarboties ar Ričardu, lai apturētu metamfetamīna tirgošanu starp Spāniju un Franciju un atrastu slepkavu, kas saistīts ar šo lietu.

programme.title: Dzīves grāmata
programme.desc: Meksikas pilsētā Sanandželā Manolo, Marija un Džoakvins laiku pavadījuši kopā jau kopš bērnības. Lai arī viņu dzīves ir bijušas atšķirīgas - Marija tika nosūtīta uz Eiropu, Džoakvins pievienojās armijai, bet Manolo studēja un kļuva par cīkstoni - viena lieta nemainījās. Manolo un Džoakvins abi vēlas apprecēt Mariju.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Mīlīgā mazpilsētiņā atrodas melna māja ar nedzīvu zālāju. Kaimiņi pat nenojauš, ka zem mājas atrodas milzu paslēptuve. Sīku pakalpiņu armijas apsargāts, Grū kaldina plānus lielākajai laupīšanai pasaules vēsturē. Viņš ir iecerējis nolaupīt Mēnesi. Jā, Mēnesi! Grū patīk viss ļaunais. Bruņojies ar samazināšanas lāzeru, sasaldēšanas staru un dažnedažādiem kaujas transporta līdzekļiem braukšanai pa zemi un pa gaisu, viņš iznīdē visu, kas gadās ceļā, līdz kādu dienu sastop trīs bārenītes ar apbrīnojamu gribasspēku…

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ziemassvētku brīvdienās dodoties uz Parīzi, Makkalisteru ģimene nejauši aizmirst mājās savu astoņgadīgo dēlu Kevinu. Tiesa, tas zēnam neliedz sarīkot pašam savas Ziemassvētku svinības. Beidzot viņu neviens vairs nekomandē, neierobežo un nepieskata! Viss būtu ideāli, ja vien rūdītie kramplauži Harijs un Mārvs nebūtu ieplānojuši apzagt visas tuvākās apkaimes mājas pašā svētku vakarā.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Iepriekšējos Ziemassvētkos, dodoties brīvdienās uz Franciju, Makkalisteri aizmirsa mājās savu jaunāko atvasi Kevinu. Šogad, dodoties uz Floridu, viņi dēlu pazaudē lidostā. Kamēr ģimene lido uz Maiami, Kevins ar tēva kredītkartēm kabatā ir ceļā uz Ņujorku. Lielajā pilsētā viņš atrod jaunus draugus, iekārtojas lepnākajā viesnīcā un sastop arī savus vecos paziņas – divus aprobežotos kramplaužus. Šoreiz abi ļaundari Ziemassvētku vakarā plāno apzagt lielāko rotaļlietu veikalu Ņujorkā. Turklāt viņi jau sen alkst atriebties Kevinam – zēnam, kura dēļ nonāca cietumā.

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Vikingu pusaudzis Hikaps dzīvo Berkas salā kopā ar savu valdonīgo tēvu. Kaujas ar pūķiem ir vikingu ikdiena un dzīves veids, taču Hikapu tās neaizrauj. Tā vietā viņš labprātāk nododas visvisādiem izgudrojumiem un apkārtnes iepazīšanai. Reiz kādā no saviem klejojumiem Hikaps sastop ievainotu pūķi, kuram palīdz atkal lidot. Šī sastapšanās maina abu dzīves. Un, kad pienāk iesvētību laiks – lielā iespēja kaujā ar pūķiem sevi pierādīt tēvam un visai ciltij –, Hikaps rīkojas pavisam neparasti.

programme.title: Kungfu panda
programme.desc: Pandumānija turpinās! Kļuvis par varoni, panda Po nu kopā ar saviem draugiem Tīģerieni, Dzērvi, Čūsku, Pērtiķi un Dievlūdzēju aizsargā dzimto ieleju un tās iemītniekus. Taču Po mierīgajai dzīvei tiek pielikts punkts brīdī, kad uzrodas ļaundaris, kurš, liekot lietā noslēpumainu spēku, grib pakļaut Ķīnu. Pandai kopā ar draugiem būs jādodas cauri visai Ķīnai, lai uzveiktu pretinieku.

programme.title: Madagaskara
programme.desc: Iemīļotie animācijas filmas "Madagaskara" varoņi ir atgriezušies! Pingvīni, liekot lietā teju vai militāru precizitāti un visus iespējamos līdzekļus, ir saremontējuši vecu, reiz avarējušu lidmašīnu. Iecerēts, ka tieši tajā pazīstamie Madagaskaras varoņi dosies atpakaļ uz mājām - uz Ņujorku. Plāns ir labs, taču drīz vien Alekss, Mārtijs, Melmans, Glorija un pingvīnu komanda strauji piezemējas mežonīgajos Āfrikas plašumos, kur zoodārzā augusī četrotne pirmoreiz satiek savus sugas brāļus. Kāds no viņiem šeit atradīs savus radus, citam būs romantiski piedzīvojumi, bet nav gan zināms, vai Āfrika būs labāka par viņu mājām Centrālparka zoodārzā...

programme.title: Lemāna-66: Lielais izaicinājums
programme.desc: Filmas sižets balstīts patiesos notikumus un atgādina par autosporta vēstures spriedzes pilnām lapaspusēm. Notikumi risinās 60. gados, kad konstruktoru grupa, kuru vadīja Kerols Šelbijs, kopā ar britu sacīkšu braucēju Kenu Mailsu uzbūvēja vēl nebijušu "Ford" sporta automašīnu un meta izaicinājumu Lemānas 24 stundu sacīkšu favorītam "Ferrari".

programme.title: Tas nav OK
programme.desc: Ambicioza jauna sieviete iegūst sekotājus un slavu internetā, pozicionējot sevi kā nāvējoša uzbrukuma izdzīvotāju. Taču drīz atklājas, ka atpazīstamība tiešsaistē nāk par šausmīgu cenu.

programme.title: Imigrante
programme.desc: 1921. gads. Nevainīga imigrante ar viltu tiek iemānīta burlesku un vodeviļas pasaulē, līdz kāds žilbinošs burvju mākslinieks mēģina viņu glābt un palīdz atrast sievietes māsu, kas tiek turēta karantīnā Elisa salā.

programme.title: Kamēr mēs esam jauni
programme.desc: Bezbērnu pārim šķiet, ka draugi no viņiem attālinās. Tāpēc viņi iepazīstas ar kādu jaunu pāri, kam ir simtiem traku ideju. Šķiet, ka viņiem nav nekā kopēja. Tomēr nekad nav par vēlu justies jaunam!

programme.title: Absolūtā patiesība
programme.desc: 17 gadus vecais Maiks Lesiters apsūdzēts sava turīgā tēva slepkavībā. Lai gan pierādījumi pret apsūdzēto ir šķietami neapgāžami, viņa aizstāvības advokāts Ričards Remzijs gatavs darīt visu, lai Maiku attaisnotu. Ar jaunās advokātes Dženelas palīdzību viņš dara visu iespējamo, lai noskaidrotu, kas īsti notika slepkavības dienā.

programme.title: Basketbols: Eirolīga. FC Bayern - Fenerbahce
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Cīņu sports: One Championship. ONE Friday Fights
programme.desc: ONE Championship is a mixed martial arts (MMA) organization that showcases world-class fighters from across the globe. With a focus on martial arts values and a commitment to integrity, the league promotes adrenaline-pumping, action-packed fights that entertain and inspire fans worldwide. ONE Championship not only showcases the skills of elite fighters, but also highlights the cultural aspects of martial arts, making it a unique and captivating sporting experience.

programme.title: LaLiga. Mallorca - Real Madrid
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Bundesliga. Stuttgart - Dortmund
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the weeks action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: LaLiga. Atletico Madrid - Barcelona
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. programme.title: UFC. Renato Moicano-Chris Duncan
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Womens MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their propertys full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroits iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The worlds most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Is this home security video proof that UFOs are messing with our technology? Did a species of carnivorous marsupials thought to be long extinct just get caught on camera? Did a visitor at a historic cemetery in Savannah capture home video of a ghost child? And a metal detectorist claims to have recorded the sound a hungry Bigfoot in the Alaskan wilderness. Tony Harris and his team of experts dive into these claims to find the truth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Forged in Fire, an American competition series aired on the History Channel, challenges four new competitors to produce a knife in their own style with a small variety of metal objects to create from. The series, hosted by Wil Willis, consists of a three-round elimination contest to forge bladed weapons, with the final winner receiving $10,000 and the days championship title. Judged by experts in weapon history and use, the last two people standing must create in their own forge a Moro Kris sword, a blade which dates back to 300BC, in just five days. Filmed in Brooklyn, New York, the set referred to as "The Forge" sets the scene for this suspenseful show with propane forges, power hammers and hydraulic presses, with medical personnel being close by to treat any injuries or other health problems. If the medical personnel suspect that the competitors are unable to continue safely, they will be disqualified. Once each competitor has created their weapon, it will be put through a series of tests including chopping/slashing/stabbing objects such as ropes, ice blocks, animal carcasses and steel car doors. Having to meet a number of criterias, the smiths battle it out, without their swords, to become the best black-smith.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Does a video recently presented to Congress by the U.S. Navy prove once and for all that UFOs really exist? Is the latest alleged Loch Ness Monster footage the most compelling proof of the creatures existence in years? How does a zombie fish head bite its way through a tin can? And marine scientists discover a mysterious "Yellow Brick Road" at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. Tony and his team of experts examine the evidence to find the truth.

programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Forged in Fire, an American competition series aired on the History Channel, challenges four new competitors to produce a knife in their own style with a small variety of metal objects to create from. The series, hosted by Wil Willis, consists of a three-round elimination contest to forge bladed weapons, with the final winner receiving $10,000 and the days championship title. Judged by experts in weapon history and use, the last two people standing must create in their own forge a Moro Kris sword, a blade which dates back to 300BC, in just five days. Filmed in Brooklyn, New York, the set referred to as "The Forge" sets the scene for this suspenseful show with propane forges, power hammers and hydraulic presses, with medical personnel being close by to treat any injuries or other health problems. If the medical personnel suspect that the competitors are unable to continue safely, they will be disqualified. Once each competitor has created their weapon, it will be put through a series of tests including chopping/slashing/stabbing objects such as ropes, ice blocks, animal carcasses and steel car doors. Having to meet a number of criterias, the smiths battle it out, without their swords, to become the best black-smith.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Does a video recently presented to Congress by the U.S. Navy prove once and for all that UFOs really exist? Is the latest alleged Loch Ness Monster footage the most compelling proof of the creatures existence in years? How does a zombie fish head bite its way through a tin can? And marine scientists discover a mysterious "Yellow Brick Road" at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. Tony and his team of experts examine the evidence to find the truth.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Are the famous glowing lights seen above Marfa, Texas a natural or supernatural phenomenon? What spirit possessed a goat to walk down a street like a human? Are mysterious stone carvings in Japan connected to a legendary close encounter? And how did a woman miraculously survive falling on to the subway track as an oncoming train passes by? Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the clues and make a determination about the validity of what were seeing.

programme.title: Doomsday: 10 Ways the World Will End
programme.desc: Theories of how the world will meet its end in this doomsday documentary as we follow scientist Trevor S. Valle as he hypothesises with others through the series. Looking into how the human race will be wiped out with each episode examining a different theory of how the planet will be destroyed. From being swallowed by a black hole, bombed by meteorites or overcome by aliens the series covers the most popular theories. An intriguing and interesting watch that will have you questioning how things out of this world could see the end of the earth.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, well tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. Well also look at some of the Roman Empires most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Doomsday: 10 Ways the World Will End
programme.desc: Theories of how the world will meet its end in this doomsday documentary as we follow scientist Trevor S. Valle as he hypothesises with others through the series. programme.title: Brad Meltzers Decoded
programme.desc: What if the history you knew was only half the story? Brad Meltzers Decoded investigates the other half: the secret history of the symbols and codes that surround us everyday. Best-selling author Brad Meltzer has been writing novels for more than a decade. He has studied and written about some of the most revered institutions and documents in human history, including the U.S. Supreme Court, the Presidency, the Secret Service, Wall Street and the Bible. Brad has assembled a team to investigate the countless clues and theories uncovered through his years of research, but unexplored until now. From the dollar bill to the first Presidential Codes, the hidden messages of the Statue of Liberty and the ciphers protecting the location of lost Confederate gold, the team uncovers the truth behind historys most provocative secrets.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: The teams access to UFO evidence is unparalleled and their expertise allows them to quickly identify bogus claims of UFOs. Together, they use eyewitness accounts, scientific experimentation, documents recently released through the Freedom of Information Act and footage that has never been seen before on television to piece together compelling — and at times chilling — evidence of UFO phenomena. Join UFO Hunters Bill Birnes, Pat Uskert, Dr. Ted Acworth, and Jeff Tomlinson as they separate fact from fallacy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: WATU faces a crucial encounter for ONS.5 in the Battle of the Atlantic. Donitz unleashes the new torpedo that targets the escort ships. Roberts and Laidlaw must counteract the new weapon and recapture the waves.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of historys most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitlers planned supercity, and ancient Athens to Americas wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of historys most iconic eras.
